offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late payment follow-up instead of manual follow-up and tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Late payment follow-up and cash flow management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try Monthly aging reports and User-friendly dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
